About Kemi

Where Art Meets
Hairstyling

Kemi is a master hairstylist and wig specialist whose passion for beauty goes beyond the chair. With a meticulous eye for detail and a deep love for the craft, she transforms every client into royalty — one strand at a time.


From custom wig creation to flawless installs, every service is delivered with precision, care, and that unmistakable Crowned by Kemi signature.

Premium Quality Custom Creations Client First Luxury Experience Detail Oriented
Our Services

What We Offer

Every service is thoughtfully crafted to give you the most elevated hair experience imaginable.

01

Wigging

Bespoke custom wigs crafted from premium hair, tailored precisely to your head size, lifestyle, and aesthetic vision. Your perfect crown, made from scratch.

→
02

Revamping

Breathe new life into your existing wigs with deep conditioning, restyling, colour refreshes, and structural repairs. Old wigs, new glory.

→
03

Installation

Seamless, natural-looking wig installs using expert techniques that ensure your unit stays secure, comfortable, and utterly undetectable.

→
04

Ventilation

Hand-crafted hair ventilation for the most realistic hairlines. Each strand individually knotted into lace for that completely natural, grown-from-scalp look.

→
05

Glueless Styling

Protective, adhesive-free wig styling techniques that keep your natural hair healthy while delivering a flawlessly fitted look — comfort meets luxury.

→
✦

Custom Consultation

Not sure which service suits you? Book a personalised consultation with Kemi and get expert guidance tailored specifically for your hair goals.

→
